name: Chocolate California Figs
recipeInstructions:
1. Take a knife and carefully slit the side of each fig.
2. Place a nut or a marshmallow inside each fruit.
3. Set up a double boiler over simmering water (do not boil).
4. Melt the chocolate chips in the top pan, stirring until smooth.
5. Remove the pan from heat.
6. Dip each fig by its stem into the melted chocolate, coating about halfway down.
7. Place the coated figs on wax paper to allow the chocolate to harden.
